name: Darrell Issa
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $238,853 for Darrell Issa in U.S. House, CA-48. This dataset currently classifies this as Pro-Israel when total funding is above $0; additional primary-source statement and vote evidence should continue to be expanded.
